facts.value: Porsche Macan
Sleek black hair, fine, worn in a controlled ponytail with a scrunchie as the one allowed accent
Standards officer on the chapter executive board; runs conduct hearings, judges which sisters meet the house's standard
Locked-threshold habit (governs her own door)
done, natural, gleaming pale in the light
Citrus on top, green and cold underneath, nothing sweet — as perceived by Pace
glamorous, aspirational; favors places like the Greek-coded coffee shop Chi Latte on Draper
Not driven into catastrophe by an unseen wound, but walked into it by a wound whose channel she chose half-seeing

Uses warmth as an instrument applied to logistics — engineers conditions so a target removes themselves, while staying warm and inclusive (same architecture as the SATC extraction and the off-campus brunch venue)
Has a single room (own governed door), earned via her board seat
Maintains a composure that Vee reads as freedom, but which is actually armor preventing self-actualization
Cannot tell anyone about the wound because the only person she could tell is the person delivering the evidence (Vee)

value.claim: Pace is her usual type of man
value.correct_statement: On paper Pace is disqualified — short (under 6 ft), a 'weird loner,' not her usual frat jock

value.claim: Vee receives her Miranda warning / is treated as a true equal confidante
value.correct_statement: Vee never gets her Miranda warning — Miranda runs an interrogation on her while appearing a confidante
Brooke (chapter president) still outranks her — the one house fact her self-arrangement can't rearrange

facts.value: Junior
Now a person who needs — having felt alive, she needs to feel alive again; the need is the wound and cannot be unmade
Carries a 'wound' associated with deprivation; her involuntary 'Yes' was described as 'the wound's first ambulant motion' — the wound choosing what it had been deprived of.
Often pulled back and bound at the nape, dark and finished — it moves only at the very ends in the wind
dry, observational humor that punctures his (Pace's) intellectualism
Her hands are one of the body's channels for managing what the voice will not do
Vee — her deepest want since the pointing game
Miranda = worthy of admiration (weaponized) + Miranda rights; runs an interrogation all novel while appearing a confidante
Preemptive naming — naming things before anyone else can, controlling how everything lands; applies it to others, her own desire, her own experience
No other character ever sees her room (canonical)
stats class with Vee
Her 'game' — the extraction/operation — is the thing she is built for
The wound that learned to walk; her entire year is the elaboration of a single bare 'Yes' spoken in a campus pointing-game before she understood why
assembled in the 'your-skin-but-better' school; most labor-intensive thing she does, engineered to read as no makeup
engineers exclusion of inconvenient parties through venue/condition selection while keeping her hands clean and appearing generous/inclusive
Money real but social ease not fully inherited; always performing a belonging she doesn't quite own
Her dignity is the choosing; her bleakness is the cost; both are hers
First-generation wealthy; father made money on PPP loans during COVID
Permanently possesses the comparison between the smooth/unreal life and the real sensation she experienced during the year; the knowing of unreality is what makes her future unbearable
Hates Pace; the hate is the one thing he has not been allowed access to
Petite, narrow through shoulder and hip, built to the 'proper' scale
Lived inside smooth pleasantness without knowing it was unreal; had no comparison
Has been given access to her own interior by Pace and discovered it is not what she thought
Has long known the face is exquisite with 'no one inside it'; aware of her own emptiness for a while
Has had popularity and admirers, but never an experience of being a real friend who is relied upon
Almost never says something she hasn't already rehearsed; lack of ready material signals the plan has escaped her
Solitaire on a fine chain worn at her throat; diamond, typically Cartier white gold or similar formal piece; recurring

Daily wear: athleisure-adjacent, never actual gym clothes for class — Align leggings / an Alo set styled up with good cashmere and clean white sneakers, gold jewelry kept on. Strategic elevation of casual pieces through luxury layering and accessories; represents calculated self-presentation and deniable self-censorship.
Gives a full smile that arrives all at once, described as a 'beam' she turns on people; makes the recipient feel like the only thing in the frame
Begged at the bench — 'Please. Please, Pace. Please.' — the first and only verbal admission of need in her adult life
Dark green Mercedes convertible — the green so dark it reads as black until the sun moves on it
The work of the year is operationalizing the same need in channels that do not require the begging-voice
Believes themselves to be the lesser one
Visible campus figure: sits on sorority standards board; ran spring philanthropy event that received campus newspaper coverage
Organizes her week around the SATC lunches more than around Pace or the sorority; they are the most important real thing in her life
'Yes, with data' — an informed yes: she would advance again every time, paying the loss of Vee repeatedly, because the alternative is the 'nothing' the flat date confirmed
Trained dancer; described by Pace as a trained instrument and skilled follow
Used to playing second fiddle to men and being sexually traded, and finds it thrilling
Her interior had not previously generated aliveness on its own
Maintains an internal 'apparatus' of containment/composure that suppresses expressions of need.
Pre-existing lesbian/same-sex desire; surfaced and activated by aliveness-producing experiences (e.g., Pace), not authored by external parties
Gives her signal up front to capture; instrumented deployment of self-presentation to engineer outcomes and shape perception
Her armor (evaluation-of-men apparatus) is built against coercion and against being used; calibrated only against bad men, not against a good man

The wound that learned to walk; her entire behavioral apparatus is organized around the transformation of deprivation into agency; habituated refusal of need reconstituted as sadistic wanting and instrumental warmth applied to logistics
Wants what Vee has — aliveness, bravery, the experience of being a real friend to someone who treats her as substance rather than position
Cannot separate her sadism from her genuine love for Vee
Feels empty/hollow during conventionally appropriate intimacy; experiences sex as a performance she could do in her sleep, 'operating the equipment'
Her threat-assessment judgment was correct/right
your-skin-but-better school; the most labor-intensive thing she does, engineered to read as no makeup

Permits minimal environmental adjustment to her person without defensive correction; the wind may lay open her collar another half-inch but no more; moves through space as one who grants measured access without performance of adjustment
One of two central practitioners of 'habituated refusal' (her refusal of need; Pace's refusal of need is in a different register)
Perpetual seeking — measuring each approximation against an apex she cannot reconstruct; this is her present state, not a future trajectory
Standards board officer; ran spring philanthropy event covered in campus paper

Substantially wounded at the bench in a single sustained scene — fast-installed, not slow-accumulated. Vulnerability-leading-to-regret installed in one operation. Depth of appetite = depth of structural change. (v7)
Three distinct appetites that ignite on different schedules: (c) loose aliveness-need, (b) hunger for the operation/domination-sadism rush, (a) specific sexual hunger for Vee herself
More aroused by an exquisitely-timed conversational humiliation of Vee than by competent sex with a man, because the former touches what she wants and the latter does not
Thrilling and demeaning are the same wound for her — shame functions as gasoline
Small, light walk; consistent and ritualistic, walked the same way every morning of the year
Reads only the left side of social and financial hierarchies; has never had to find the bottom of a column—pattern suggesting selective engagement with systems of inequality
Structurally paralleled with Vee so that neither woman is the villain; both are casualties of the same event
slight perpetual surprise
lesbian; pre-existing desire surfaced by aliveness with Pace, not created by him
Orderly; everything earns its hanger; palette runs bone to camel to oatmeal with one disciplined oxblood at the end.
Startlingly blue eyes that are the first thing anyone notices about her; she has built her entire adult life around being looked at for them.
Since the begging at the bench, Randi needs in operational silence — the need persists but the begging-voice is forbidden
Lived twenty-one years (her adult life) with no channels of aliveness
Gets aliveness-by-operating, which she now needs; lacks aliveness-by-being-able-to-self-actualize-the-need
All six channels (planning/replaying operations, Vee's updates about Pace, jealousy, sex with Pace, controlling Vee, engaging in scenes with Vee) are sources of aliveness
Holds one of the rare structural positions in the novel where she has agency Pace cannot access
Cannot be loved well; could not hold Pace's reception of her at the bench; no other channel exists through which she could be received at that depth

Athleisure-adjacent styling with intentional elevation: Align leggings / Alo sets paired with good cashmere and clean white sneakers; gold jewelry kept on; never actual gym clothes for class; styled up to signal effort and taste within casual framework

The quality of her attention: she makes whoever she is focused on feel like the most interesting person in the room. The effect is immediate and addictive; those around her are aware they are in a 'beam' even as they surrender to it.
Feels nothing without both Pace and Vee; requires 'both flames burning her' to feel anything at all
Defined by not needing; her core organizing principle was undone when she was made into a person who needs

Her plainness and exclusion from appearance and sexual economies enable her to read Randi's operations and structure rather than being caught in the appearance beam—she has no skin in the economy Randi manages
Randi is running an exchange/operation that Cassie is not a player in
Experiences Cassie as an obstacle/thing in the way of what she wants, easily disposed of
a 9-10, the sorority archetype, 'contained' where Vee is abundant

Reads social and financial hierarchies superficially, understanding only the surface layer (left side of a column); never required to trace consequences to their bottom, suggesting deep habituation to privilege that prevents comprehensive systemic understanding

Apples were on her side of the line her mother had drawn for her at fourteen and the sorority had redrawn for her at eighteen — sorority structures are internalized as boundary lines, redrawn versions of maternal rules that shape her sense of acceptable/unacceptable
Mental life consumed by the Vee-channel across six concurrent channels of aliveness
Gravitates toward petite, narrow-framed, polished women who are socially composed and aesthetically correct — women who share her grammar of designer labels, controlled presentation, and propriety.
Lived twenty-one years with no channels of aliveness
Holds visible campus prominence: sits on the standards board, led a philanthropy event covered by the campus paper, and is recognized as a social apex figure whose approval confers belonging.
diamond solitaire necklace on fine chain at throat; one bright hard point catching the lamp

Hate, envy, sadism, and genuine affection are not separate drives but four refracted expressions of a single core wound; each emerges depending on proximity to and interaction with different parties (Pace, Vee, etc.)
Structurally orphaned — cannot be articulated to any standard the world or she would accept; held in private; no protocol was violated to justify it
Existing and intrinsic; Pace surfaces/activates desire that was already present, does not author it. Aliveness produced by Pace reveals pre-existing lesbian desire rather than creating it.
Hatred of Pace; described as the most cultivated thing in her by the close of the novel
Hate is the only warm thing in her chest, valued because it is 'something she made herself'

Women who are physically present without apology, warm and open rather than closed or performative, and capable of genuine unselfconscious expression — the opposite of Randi's own carefully managed presentation. Revealed during the pointing game when given freedom to choose.
Organized against producing hunger at all; has no equipment/hardware for being a hungering thing
Hate, envy, sadism, and genuine liking are not separate engines but four faces of one wound, refracted through whichever party she is near
No other character ever sees her room (canonical)
Withholds signal until earned; un-instrumented opposite of Randi who gives signal up front to capture
Small amused expression, 'yeah, what about it' attitude; anchors every conversation she is in

A narrow closet worked to its limit with a disciplined, stable system maintained over at least two years. Palette runs bone to camel to oatmeal with one deliberate oxblood accent, reflecting a temperament of controlled order with a single permitted intensity.
Reads only the surface/privileged layer of hierarchies and financial systems; never developed the habit of searching for structural bottoms or constraints due to lifetime insulation from scarcity
Gives away nothing; neutral, controlled, unreadable
Never names her own need on the page; naming need is the exposure she exists to prevent; least capable of articulating it herself

Built her entire adult life around being looked at for; yet being truly seen by Pace (having her inner machinery perceived) breaches her only defense and produces resentment despite compulsive return; trapped between the need to control perception and the involuntary draw toward being led/seen by someone who penetrates that control
Small leather overnight bag, monogrammed in sorority hand, expensive in slightly aggressive manner; reflects controlled aesthetic and aspirational taste

Brooke holds greater institutional and social authority than Randi within the chapter hierarchy; Randi recognizes from her own inside board experience that Brooke commands more organizational power than she herself does.

Pursues aliveness as the counterforce to her core wound of deprivation; experiences full engagement with life as the solvent that surfaces her suppressed self; the need for aliveness is both her wound and her primary driver
slight perpetual surprise

The wound that learned to walk — her psychological apparatus is organized such that a deprivation-wound produces ambulant agency; her core engine runs on the contradiction between habituated refusal of need and the aliveness-state that being-seen produces
Files Cassie as the dull, un-charmable, removable roommate

Deepest architectural fact (v6). Apparatus organized for twenty-one years so she would never produce need requiring another person; wanting permitted, getting sufficient. The need-refusal is so thorough it has no operational channels: she cannot ask, cannot receive-as-needing, cannot move toward the need.
A cashmere blanket, brought after the second week of their relationship because she gets cold after sex even in his too-warm house

The wound that learned to walk—a person organized for twenty-one years to refuse need, whose entire apparatus is habituated refusal; the wound itself became ambulant through a single involuntary 'Yes', and the whole year is the elaboration of that syllable; aliveness is the need and the wound cannot be unmade
Built her entire adult life around being looked at for; the thing she constructed herself to accomplish and maintain
One of two confidantes competing for Vee's disclosures; the 'hunger-object' representing glamour/ascent that Vee reaches toward
Highly trained social mover; can engineer apparently accidental meetings with strangers using precision and invisibility, developed through years of dance training and sorority social formation.
A loose aliveness-need awakened by Pace; already running before Vee; pre-articulate recognition that something 'might feed it'
Cannot abandon the configuration because it is six concurrent channels of aliveness, not any single element
Organized against need; not a needing person by constitution
Her plainness and non-investment in appearance and sexual economies grant her clear sight of Randi's operational architecture rather than being caught in the beam of presentation
Originally a choice, sustained into structural-feeling practice, prepared by family formation, deployed at adult scale, compounded across years
Built on control; experiences being seen as a breach of her only defense
Citrus with something green and cold underneath, notably absent of sweetness — Pace's unsophisticated read of her gardenia perfume
Cannot have a real, unmanaged want without wrapping it in a socially survivable frame, and the frame hollows out the realness
Operates on the thing she wants; produces in Vee the responses Vee's body is constituted to produce; 'has her hand on the lever'
Hunger for the operation — the domination/sadism rush; both anticipatory (planning lights it) and experiential (running it intensifies it), with the doing the stronger igniter

Within the sorority, Randi publicly frames her relationship with Pace as him simply being hard to say no to — a self-deprecating, low-stakes explanation delivered with a laugh that positions the relationship as something that happened to her rather than something she actively chose.
spent twenty-one years perfecting the surface Pace saw past

Randi believes: Experiences sorority structures as external lines redrawn from maternal boundaries—a framing that suggests both acceptance and constraint, where social rules feel predetermined and relocatable rather than chosen
Has an 'armor'/apparatus designed to identify and repel threats

Carries a private envy of Vee beneath her controlled, appetitive surface. Publicly ranks Vee below herself in every social context, but privately wants what Vee has access to. This contradiction is not fully consciously acknowledged by Randi herself — it operates as a subterranean drive beneath her performed superiority.
At ease with want; runs on need, which she cannot supply herself and cannot be seen having
Built her entire adult life around being looked at for; the apparatus organized around control; being seen breaches her primary defense and triggers resentment despite compulsive return

Acknowledged by the group as the most conventionally attractive person in the social circle by a measurable margin; men's attention distributes toward Randi over others (including Vee) when both are present — a stable background dynamic in shared social settings.
Experiences sorority social structure as a redrawing of maternal boundaries set at fourteen; operates within these redrawn institutional lines as a form of internalized control and positioning
Public arguments — her material world and object choices are curated for an audience that isn't there, including herself as observer; she is always watched, including by herself
Randi believes: prettiest at the table by measurable distance; Vee's perception

The wound that learned to walk; sadism as the channel of her own wanting; habituated refusal of need organized her apparatus for twenty-one years to ensure she would never produce the kind of need that requires another person to fill; her core driver is the need to feel alive again after feeling alive (the wound cannot be unmade)
Pure dismissal; Cassie barely registers; non-affect is deliberate
Dark hair worn pulled back and bound at the nape; clean jawline; small, high figure. Favors fine materials — silk camisoles, cashmere. Presents an immaculate, finished surface at all times.
Operates on the very capacity she cannot possess; 'has her hand on the lever of an apparatus she does not possess'
Experiences the lunches with Vee as simultaneously the best and worst hours of her week; would not trade them
Specific sexual hunger for Vee herself; slowest to ignite; stays braided inside (b) for most of the year, not separated as naked desire-for-this-woman
Need inverted — forcing Vee into the needer-position so Randi stays the un-needy operator; the form her wanting takes when she cannot hold what she wants / when received-from is foreclosed
Trained dancer with a decade of dance training; under pressure manifests as small high arches lifted, calves tightening, body line executing trained responses
Small high arches lifted, calves tightening, the line of her body doing what a decade of dance had trained it to do under pressure
Need exists in her but functions as obstacle rather than orientation; lacks channels to ask, receive, or admit an interior requiring filling

negations.claim: Pace is her usual type of man
negations.correct_statement: On paper Pace is disqualified — short (under 6 ft), a 'weird loner,' not her usual frat jock

negations.claim: Vee receives her Miranda warning / is treated as a true equal confidante
negations.correct_statement: Vee never gets her Miranda warning — Miranda runs an interrogation on her while appearing a confidante
Brooke (chapter president) still outranks her — the one house fact her self-arrangement can't rearrange
